Live GPS Sync

The Intelligence Engine

Intelligent
Itineraries

Simply tell Safar where you want to go. Advanced AI crafts a day-by-day route, optimised for timing, distance, and cultural significance — then updates in real-time as you travel.

Live GPS Distance Tracking

Real-time distances to every stop on your route, updating as you move.

Best-Time Recommendations

AI surfaces optimal visit windows — morning prayers, golden hour, off-peak entry.

Cultural Context & Food Nearby

Rich historical narratives and curated restaurant picks at every waypoint.

Everything You Need

The Travel Suite

Four powerful screens. One seamless journey. Safar puts everything from wallet to world discovery in your pocket.

Finance

Smart Wallet

Track every rupee in real-time. Set a budget, log expenses on the go, and swipe left to delete any entry. Full transparency, zero surprise.

Discovery

Hidden Gems

Tawang monasteries, Gokarna beaches, Chopta meadows — Safar's AI surfaces the places the guidebooks never mention.

Profile

Journey Vault

Every trip archived, secured, and yours. Manage credentials, AI data credits, and revisit past adventures from one elegant profile hub.

Production-grade technologies chosen for performance, reliability, and scale.

React Native

Cross-platform mobile with native performance and fluid animations
